_comment: Config for the roster ingest autopilot (/roster-loop + tools/refresh_sources.py). Policy rationale: wiki/decisions/2026-07-19-ingest-scheduling-policy.md. Budget is TIME-BOXED (no reliable API for subscription usage %); calibration evidence accumulates in wiki/learnings/roster-ingest-autopilot.md and autopilot/journal.jsonl.

workers._comment: Two-machine load-sharing. Each machine sets its identity ONCE (python tools/autopilot_journal.py set-worker <name>), then just runs /loop /roster-loop — a worker only ever ingests the clones assigned to it, so two accounts on disjoint clones never duplicate or git-conflict (each clone is its own repo). A machine with NO identity set ignores this map and works ALL clones (unchanged single-machine behavior). Every clone in focus_order should appear under exactly one worker. Rebalance by editing the lists. Policy: wiki/decisions/2026-07-19-parallel-ingest-and-workers.md.
